heading: Definitions
label: 2200j Definitions
notes: Amendments2021— substituted “§” for “SEC.” in section designation.Pub. L. 116–283
amendments: Amendments2021— substituted “§” for “SEC.” in section designation.Pub. L. 116–283

children.text: The term “program” means the Defense Civilian Training Corps program established under section 2200g.
The term “member of the program” means a student at an accredited civilian educational institution who is enrolled in the program.
